description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a mix of brick and stucco exterior walls, a red-tiled gable roof, and a partially enclosed backyard. The property features a small fenced garden with a tree, a round above-ground pool, and a patio area. The house includes a visible garage with a driveway and a white car parked outside. There is a prominent upper story section with large windows, and the main entrance is sheltered by a small overhang supported by columns. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the backyard is landscaped with grass and a tree in bloom. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with clear separation between living, garage, and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern suburban house with a red-tiled gable roof, brick and stucco exterior, fenced backyard, and attached garage. Features include a landscaped garden, above-ground pool, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Side view showing the fenced backyard with a blooming tree, above-ground pool, and patio area.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the garage, driveway with a car, and the main entryway with an overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, upper story, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_3: Backyard-focused view with clear visibility of the garden, pool, tree, and patio, as well as the rear facade of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang supported by columns, and a short set of steps leading to the entrance.
